title: Spicy Vietnamese Ginger Stir-fry
description: A quick-fix Vietnamese dish featuring sweet smoked paprika and ginger, perfect for a spicy whole30-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup of shredded chicken
ingredients.notes: can be substituted with tofu or tempeh for a vegetarian option

instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat. Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove chicken from the pan and set aside. Add onion to the same pan and cook until softened, about 4 minutes.
Add garlic and ginger to the pan, cooking for an additional minute. Stir in smoked paprika, white pepper, soy sauce, and lime juice. Bring to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the pan with its juices. Add carrots and scallions, tossing well until everything is heated through.
Stir in baby spinach leaves and cook just until wilted, about 1 minute.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
